description: Long-lived engineering tools that Codex automation can discover and maintain.

items.title: Agent Service diagnostics CLI
items.notes: Used for Agent Service health, session, log, model and Workspace diagnostics, including cross-store mutation-to-projection-to-canonical flows and performance percentiles.

items.title: Automation registry checker
items.notes: Validates automation registry paths, root script references and documentation references.

items.title: In-progress plan stale issue scanner
items.notes: Reports stale, completed-in-progress, duplicate-title and broken-link candidates under docs/plans/进行中 without modifying files.

items.title: Workspace Authority deployment preflight
docs: docs/项目文档/创作端/06-基础设施/技术/03_Docker部署方案.md
items.notes: Read-only scan for unregistered live Workspaces, drift, leases, prepared transactions, committed backup gaps and shared Compose DATA_DIR mismatches.

items.title: Workspace Authority idempotent migration
docs: docs/项目文档/创作端/11-诊断与日志/技术/02_Codex查询CLI与导出包.md
items.notes: Dry-run by default; --apply bootstraps Authority state and committed backups for one workspace, one project or all live Workspaces without changing business files.
